# The Self Employed Sponsor Pitch Deck

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

The Problem: You have great products and services that can really help the self-employed, the microbusiness, the freelancer . . . But only if you could locate them! The self employed, independent contractor, microbusiness market is notoriously hard to reach because, well, they have a problem too:20 Million Small Businesses Have No Home Online

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns branding, formation, funding during Ideation, Formation, Launch and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- The Problem: You have great products and services that can really help the self-employed, the microbusiness, the freelancer . . .
- But only if you could locate them!
- The self employed, independent contractor, microbusiness market is notoriously hard to reach because, well, they have a problem too:20 Million Small Businesses Have No Home Online
- According to the Census Bureau99% of all business in the U.S. are small business BUT95% of those are self employed and/or have 3 or fewer employees
- Who are These Small Business?The Self EmployedThe MicrobusinessThe Independent ProfessionalThe FreelancerThe Independent ContractorThe Sole ProprietorThe SolopreneurThe Startup
- The Issue:Regular small businesses have a plethora of online sites, assistance and attention devoted to them, e.g. . .
- SCORE.org, Inc.com, USA TODAY Small Business, Entrepreneur.com, American Express OPEN Forum, Bank of America Small Business Online Community, Huffington Post Small Business, MSN, MSNBC Small Business, SBA.gov . . .

## People and links

- Organizations: SCORE, U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA)
- Contact: Strausssstrauss@MrAllBiz.com

Open the cited source link when available and route follow-up to SCORE or the named qualified resource.
